## BufferAppendedEvent type

Fired after a segment has been appended to a SourceBuffer.

**Signature:**

```typescript
type BufferAppendedEvent = {
    type: MediaType;
    segment: InitSegment | Segment;
    data: ArrayBuffer;
};
```
**References:** [MediaType](/reference/cmaf-lite.mediatype)<!-- -->, [InitSegment](/reference/cmaf-lite.initsegment)<!-- -->, [Segment](/reference/cmaf-lite.segment)
